expectations.text: References at least one script by filename

expectations.text: Links to a relevant reference file
expectations.evidence: No references/*.md files are linked. The response does not point to best_practices.md, security.md, optimization.md, or any other skill reference documentation.

Follows a structured implementation approach organized in numbered sections: Build Optimization Strategy -> Complete Pipeline Configuration (with 7 phased jobs) -> Pipeline Architecture Diagram -> Key Speed Optimizations -> Security Scanning Summary -> Additional Configuration -> Branch Protection -> Monitoring -> Quick Wins Checklist -> Cost Considerations. This is a task-based workflow with security integration.

The pipeline is organized into 7 clearly labeled phases (Phase 1: Setup & Change Detection through Phase 7: Deploy). Section 9 provides a numbered 6-item Quick Wins Checklist for immediate improvements. The overall structure guides the user through implementation in a logical order.
